data.title: At Sea-Air-Space 2026, HII’s Newport News Shipbuilding President Reinforces Support for Expanding U.S. Shipbuilding Capacity
data.description: In National Harbor, Maryland on April 21, 2026, Kari Wilkinson, the Executive Vice President and President of Newport News Shipbuilding under HII (NYSE: HII), emphasized the company's dedication to enhancing the U.S. maritime industrial base at the U.S. Navy League's Sea-Air-Space Exposition 2026.
The overnight interbank rate in Taiwan starts at 0.805%, the same as the prior session open.

data.title: REMINDER -- Aeroméxico Announces Webcast of First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Grupo Aeroméxico S.A.B. de C.V. announced a live conference call and webcast scheduled for April 22, 2026, at 10:30 a.m. Mexico City Time (12:30 p.m. ET / NY Time) to review its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026. Aeroméxico, listed on NYSE as AERO and BMV as AERO, will conduct the discussion.
European futures for equities fall 0.15%.
According to Trump, Iran is losing around $500 million daily because the Strait of Hormuz is shut.
Axios: Trump weighs extending waiver aimed at easing U.S. oil exports
The 2-year Japanese government bond yield advances 0.5 bps to 1.350%.
AUSTRALIA WESTPAC LEADING INDEX (M/M): –0.09%% (PREV –0.09%; PREVR –0.06%)
South Korea’s key stock index climbs 0.2% at most, reaching an all-time high of 6,404.03 points.
Japan’s benchmark TOPIX index drops 0.9% to stand at 3,737.12.
Lufthansa cuts 20,000 flights to save fuel as prices soar, per FT
10-year Japanese Government Bond yields rose 1.5 basis points, reaching 2.395%.
The Nikkei 225 wipes out earlier declines, last seen trading flat.

data.title: EZE Cloud Consulting Advances AI-first Strategy with Agile In-house Deployment of Workday GO
data.description: EZE Cloud Consulting is making strides in its AI-first approach by efficiently implementing Workday GO in-house at locations in Singapore, Bengaluru, and San Francisco. This strategic move marks a significant development in their business, showcasing their commitment to leveraging cutting-edge technology.
Urea exports from Indonesia will be directed to India, the Philippines, Thailand, and Brazil.

data.title: Figure Technology Solutions Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: New York, 21st April 2026 - Figure Technology Solutions, listed as Nasdaq: FIGR and OPEN: FGRS, a prominent blockchain-focused capital marketplace facilitating origination, funding, sale, and trading of tokenized assets, has revealed intentions to disclose its performance for the First Quarter of 2026 on Monday, 11th May 2026, post market closure. A conference call to deliberate on the results, future prospects, and associated topics is scheduled for the ensuing morning, Tuesday, 12th May 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time.
